lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਅਪਣਾ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਭ ਫਲ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur apanaa sev sabh fal paaeaa |
lines.english: Serving my True Guru, I have obtained all the fruits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਉ ਸਦਾ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: amrit har kaa naau sadaa dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: I meditate continually on the Ambrosial Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭਏ ਅਚਿੰਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਨਿਹਚਲਾਇਆ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: naanak bhe achint har dhan nihachalaaeaa |20|
lines.english: O Nanak, I have become care-free; I have obtained the imperishable wealth of the Lord. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਮਿਟਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa kai sang dukh mittaaeaa |
lines.english: In the Society of the Saints, I am rid of my pain and suffering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੇਤਿ ਮਿਆਲਾ ਉਚੀਆ ਘਰੁ ਉਚਾ ਨਿਰਣਉ ॥
lines.translit: khet miaalaa ucheea ghar uchaa nirnau |
lines.english: Raising the embankments of the mind's field, I gaze at the heavenly mansion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲ ਭਗਤੀ ਘਰਿ ਸਰੈ ਸਜਣ ਪਾਹੁਣਿਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: mehal bhagatee ghar sarai sajan paahuniaau |
lines.english: When devotion comes to the mind of the soul-bride, she is visited by the friendly guest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨੑ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣੈ ਜਿਨੑ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak tina balihaaranai jina guramukh paaeaa man maeh |1|
lines.english: Nanak is a sacrifice to those Gurmukhs who obtain the Lord in their minds. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਰਸਨਾ ਤ ਬਰਸੁ ਘਨਾ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਬਰਸਹਿ ਕਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: barasanaa ta baras ghanaa bahurr baraseh kaeh |
lines.english: O clouds, if you are going to rain, then go ahead and rain; why rain after the season has passed?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਆਪਿ ਕਰੇ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh jaaneeai jaa kau aap kare paragaas |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, he is known as a Gurmukh, whom the Lord Himself enlightens. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਠਾ ਸੋ ਜੋ ਭਾਵਦਾ ਸਜਣੁ ਸੋ ਜਿ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: mitthaa so jo bhaavadaa sajan so ji raas |
lines.english: That which is pleasing is sweet, and one who is sincere is a friend.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪਾਸਿ ਜਨ ਕੀ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਤੂ ਸਚਾ ਸਾਂਈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh paas jan kee aradaas too sachaa saanee |
lines.english: O God, Your humble servant offers his prayer to You; You are my True Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਰਖਵਾਲਾ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਹਉ ਤੁਧੁ ਧਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: too rakhavaalaa sadaa sadaa hau tudh dhiaaee |
lines.english: You are my Protector, forever and ever; I meditate on You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭਿ ਤੇਰਿਆ ਤੂ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant sabh teriaa too rahiaa samaaee |
lines.english: All the beings and creatures are Yours; You are pervading and permeating in them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਦਾਸ ਤੇਰੇ ਕੀ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਕਰੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਾਰਿ ਪਚਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jo daas tere kee nindaa kare tis maar pachaaee |
lines.english: One who slanders Your slave is crushed and destroyed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਕਰਤਾ ਜਗੁ ਮੁਆ ਆਸਾ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa karataa jag muaa aasaa marai na jaae |
lines.english: Building up its hopes, the world dies, but its hopes do not die or depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿੰਤਾ ਛਡਿ ਅਚਿੰਤੁ ਰਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਗਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: chintaa chhadd achint rahu naanak lag paaee |21|
lines.english: Falling at Your Feet, Nanak has renounced his cares, and has become care-free. ||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਨਸਾ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਇਸੀ ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਤੀ ਸੋ ਲੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa manasaa mar jaaeisee jin keetee so lai jaae |
lines.english: Hopes and desires shall die only when He, who created them, takes them away.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਸਾ ਪੂਰੀਆ ਸਚੇ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak aasaa pooreea sache siau chit laae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, hopes are fulfilled only by attaching one's consciousness to the True Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜਗਤੁ ਉਪਾਇਓਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਪੂਰਾ ਥਾਟੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape jagat upaaeon kar pooraa thaatt |
lines.english: He Himself created the world, with His perfect workmanship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਬਾਝਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਨਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak nihachal ko nahee baajhahu har kai naae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, nothing is permanent, except the Name of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਆਪੇ ਬੋਹਿਥਾ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਖੇਵਾਟੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape saagar aape bohithaa aape hee khevaatt |
lines.english: He Himself is the ocean, He Himself is the boat, and He Himself is the boatman.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਾਹੁ ਆਪੇ ਵਣਜਾਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਹਰਿ ਹਾਟੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape saahu aape vanajaaraa aape hee har haatt |
lines.english: He Himself is the true banker, He Himself is the merchant, and He Himself is the store.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਗੁਰੁ ਚੇਲਾ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੇ ਦਸੇ ਘਾਟੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape gur chelaa hai aape aape dase ghaatt |
lines.english: He Himself is the Guru, He Himself is the disciple, and He Himself shows the destination.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਤੂ ਸਭਿ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਕਾਟੁ ॥੨੨॥੧॥ ਸੁਧੁ
lines.translit: jan naanak naam dhiaae too sabh kilavikh kaatt |22|1| sudh
lines.english: O servant Nanak, meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and all your sins shall be eradicated. ||22||1||Sudh||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਗੂਜਰੀ ਵਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: raag goojaree vaar mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Raag Goojaree, Vaar, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੇਤ੍ਰੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੇਖਣਾ ਸ੍ਰਵਣੀ ਸੁਨਣਾ ਗੁਰ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: netree satigur pekhanaa sravanee sunanaa gur naau |
lines.english: Let your eyes behold the True Guru, and let your ears hear the Guru's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਆਰਾਧਣਾ ਜਿਹਵਾ ਜਪਿ ਗੁਰ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: antar gur aaraadhanaa jihavaa jap gur naau |
lines.english: Deep within yourself, worship the Guru in adoration, and with your tongue, chant the Guru's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਏਹ ਵਥੁ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak kirapaa kare jis no eeh vath dee |
lines.english: Says Nanak, this treasure is bestowed on those who are blessed with His Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਤੀ ਰਤਿਆ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਾਈਐ ਠਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur setee ratiaa daragah paaeeai tthaau |
lines.english: Attuned to the True Guru, you shall receive a place of honor in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਪੈਰੀ ਪਾਇ ਕਾਜ ਸਵਾਰਿਅਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee pairee paae kaaj savaarian |
lines.english: Falling at the feet of the Guru, our works are embellished with perfection.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਉਤਮ ਕਾਢੀਅਹਿ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਕੇਈ ਕੇਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jag meh utam kaadteeeh virale keee kee |1|
lines.english: In the midst of the world, they are known as the most pious - they are rare indeed. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਖੇ ਰਖਣਹਾਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਉਬਾਰਿਅਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: rakhe rakhanahaar aap ubaarian |
lines.english: O Savior Lord, save us and take us across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਆ ਆਪਿ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਮਨਹੁ ਨ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਅਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: hoaa aap deaal manahu na visaarian |
lines.english: You have become kind, merciful and compassionate; we do not forget You from our minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਜਨਾ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਤਾਰਿਅਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: saadh janaa kai sang bhavajal taarian |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, we are carried across the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਕੀ ਟੇਕ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨੈ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: tis saahib kee ttek naanak manai maeh |
lines.english: That Lord and Master is my Anchor and Support; O Nanak, hold firm in your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਨਿੰਦਕ ਦੁਸਟ ਖਿਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਬਿਦਾਰਿਅਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: saakat nindak dusatt khin maeh bidaarian |
lines.english: In an instant, You have destroyed the faithless cynics and slanderous enemies.
